Compliance.description: POPIA-compliant, UIF/COID registered, Dept of Labour licensed, SETA accredited (Service/CATHS/HWSETA), no major violations found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 4.67/5 (3 recent 2025 reviews, positive on reliability/professionalism). Website testimonials positive. Employee reviews low (Indeed ~2.5/5). Limited volume.

Product Value.description: Comprehensive services with guarantees/replacements, but lacks pricing transparency. Multi-service value.

Innovation.description: New app (2026 update, matching algo, in-app comms/payments, no ratings yet), CRM/online booking.

Customer Support.description: WhatsApp, phone (+27 87 265 0261), email (info@maid4u.co.za), guarantees replacements. One FB complaint on rude responses, HelloPeter praises efficiency.

Accessibility & Security.description: POPIA-compliant data protection, national accessibility via website/app/WhatsApp, background checks for workers. No reported breaches.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Not publicly listed; optional online interview R220. Placement fees/packages undisclosed.

socialSentiment.summary: Limited; positive website/HelloPeter, one recent FB complaint on support, no major issues.
